ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON column to store links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for artist management */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist's agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the artist's agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing at the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, canceled, postponed) */,
  "ticket_sales_open" TEXT /* Date and time when ticket sales open */,
  "ticket_sales_close" TEXT /* Date and time when ticket sales close */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event staff member */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the staff member is responsible for */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., event manager, ticketing staff) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the staff member */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the ticket is for */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets sold */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_setlists" (
  "setlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setlist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the setlist belongs to */,
  "setlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the setlist */,
  "setlist_date" TEXT /* Date the setlist was created */,
  "setlist_status" TEXT /* Status of the setlist (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setlist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setlist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_setlists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setlist_songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "setlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "song_order" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the setlist */,
  "song_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setlist_songs_setlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("setlist_id") REFERENCES artist_setlists ("setlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the review is for */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the rating is for */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_ratings_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the rating is for */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the photo is for */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was taken */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photo record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photo record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_photos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
